name: Chicken Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, cook the chicken in water until tender.
2. Cool the broth and skim off any fat that rises to the surface.
3. Bone the chicken and cut it into bite-sized pieces. Return these pieces to the kettle along with the remaining ingredients.
4. Simmer everything together, covered, for at least 1 hour or until the vegetables and barley are tender. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
